International Relations and Erasmus Office

The European Union Coordination Office is an academic unit established within Doğuş University to conduct interdisciplinary research on European issues, carry out academic studies by developing various international projects, and establish the European Union infrastructure of Doğuş University.

Academics specialized in European Union studies work within the Coordination Office. Another objective of the European Union Coordination Office is to act as an academic and intellectual platform during Türkiye’s integration process with the European Union, conducting studies in this field and supporting ongoing efforts.

Within this framework, the European Union Coordination Office organizes conferences, panels, and research projects on Türkiye–EU relations and European Union topics, and cooperates with various national and international organizations, universities, and non-governmental organizations.
